base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gel_move — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Small green slime (baby Zol). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small green slime (baby Zol); 2-frame bounce; tiny, slow, clings to Link
